articles.title: Girl known as 'Chelsea Jane Doe' ID'd 26 years after mutilated body found hundreds of miles from home state

articles.title: They shoot babies: IDF jargon masks a child's killing

articles.title: Two IDF soldiers killed in Lebanon

Ohad Yaari, 21, was killed by accidental discharge of a weapon. With their deaths, the number of soldiers killed during the latest campaign in Lebanon rose to 30

The aircraft carrier has been plagued with problems since it was first brought into service. Now, it has been forced into port in Norway for repairs ahead of the 250th anniversary...
